text: A bear on the slope of a hill by some rocks and vegetation.
Three people standing in the snow with helmets and snowboards on.
A large spire of a building that has a clock on it.
Red and white buses going into a building being ushered by a person.
A person laying down on a sandy beach.
A woman sitting in a chair at a library with a laptop.
A person stands near a home with a lawn and palm trees.
A white kitchen with a combination washer drier visible
Three elephants standing around in a zoo in the dirt
A young man in baseball batting stance in uniform.
